description: Maintenance workflow to enforce Git standards and generate engineering documentation

refactor_git_commands.input: Search all JSON files in agent_workflow_definitions/sys_ops/ and replace standard 'mv' commands with 'git mv' to ensure repository history preservation for autonomous refactors.

generate_standards_doc.input: Create an ENGINEERING_STANDARDS.md file in the multi_agent_poc root. Document the requirement for 'git mv' in all structural refactors, the new 'cli_coding_agents' modular package structure, and the use of 'workflow_results/sys_ops/' for localized telemetry.

validate_maintenance_quality.input: Verify that the JSON files in agent_workflow_definitions/sys_ops/ are syntactically correct after the 'git mv' replacement and ensure the new ENGINEERING_STANDARDS.md aligns with the project's technical DNA.
